DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF BEVERLY MASRI'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING DISCOVERY REQUESTS AND IMPOSING MONETARY SANCTIONS. ARGUED AND THE COURT MODIFIED ITS RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. DEFENDANT TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY REQUESTS BY APRIL 8, 2011 AT 5:00 PM. DEFENDANT SALEH MOHAMMED HASSANEIM IS TO PAY $2,460 IN SANCTIONS TO PLAINTIFF, $1,000 OF WHICH IS TO BE PAID WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. THE REMAINING $1,460 IN SANCTIONS IS STAYED PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Discovery Requests And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT SALEH MOHAMMED HASSANEIN'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING DISCOVERY REQUESTS AND IMPOSING MONETARY SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Svetlana Rishina, Esq. of Law Offices of Svetlana Rishina 510/299-5346 for pltf & opposing party; Mark S. Bridges, Esq. of Law Offices of Steven L. Pollak 650/583-5500 for deft & moving party.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling as defendant provided a timely proof of service at the hearing. Discussed and the Court granted the motion to compel. Parties ordered to meet & confer to resolve issues. Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,000.00. Order signed in open court. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Fee paid. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion For Order Copelling Discovery Requests And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-24-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF BEVERLY MASRI'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING DISCOVERY REQUESTS AND IMPOSING MONETARY SANCTIONS. Appearances: Mark S. Bridges of the Law Offices of Steven L. Pollak (650.583.5500) for defendant and responding party; Svetlana Rishina of the Law Offices of Svetlana Rishina (510.299.5346) for plaintiff and moving party. Argued and the court modified its ruling as follows: granted. Defendant to respond to discovery requests by April 8, 2011 at 5:00 pm. Defendant Saleh Mohammed Hassaneim is to pay $2,460 in sanctions to plaintiff, $1,000 of which is to be paid within 15 days of notice of entry of this order. The remaining $1,460 in sanctions is stayed pending further order of the court. Order signed after hearing. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
